title: ORLEN and Krajowa Grupa SpoÅ¼ywcza Sign MoU to Accelerate Biomethane Production in Poland
content:
The memorandum between ORLEN and KGS provides for joint optimisation of in-house resources â€“ including agricultural and post-production waste â€“ and for securing farmland on which to apply digestate, the nutrient-rich by product of agricultural biogas plants, as fertiliser. The partners also plan to jointly scale biomethane production.
ORLEN and KGS will likewise cooperate on the production and distribution of biomethane, including the securing of all requisite administrative consents and certificates of origin for the fuel.
author: Analysts Account
